caption: A person's hands are shown against a white wood-grain background, interacting with a holiday greeting card. The card is white with a grey patterned border and features the text "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer" in a mix of serif and script fonts. In the initial stage, the person's right index finger points toward the top of the card. As the sequence progresses, the person uses both hands to carefully slide the card out of a clear plastic sleeve. The left hand holds the sleeve steady while the right hand grips the edge of the card to pull it upward and outward. By the end of the clip, the card has been partially removed from the sleeve, revealing more of the decorative grey pattern and the card's structure. Another similar card remains partially visible in its sleeve to the left of the main action.
